announcements.text: Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Cessation 1 Jun - Ashwani Kumar ceased as UCO Bank MD & CEO on 31 May 2026 after completing tenure.
Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting (BRSR) 21 May - UCO Bank filed BRSR 2025-26 under SEBI LODR and posted it on its website.
Notice Of Annual General Meeting Of The Bank 18 May - UCO Bank AGM on 12 June 2026 to approve dividend and Rs2,700 crore equity capital raising plan.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Directorate 14 May - UCO Bank appoints Shri Hari Har Mishra as director, replacing Shri Sudhir Shyam effective 13 May 2026.
